signals.headline: House Rejects Iran War Powers Resolution by 1 Vote, Preserving Trump's Authority | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
House Rejects Iran War Powers Resolution by 1 Vote, Preserving Trump's Authority | NO | HIGH confidence**  
The Republican-controlled House voted 213-214 against a war powers resolution ordering President Trump to end the Iran war, with only Rep. Thomas Massie (R-KY) defecting from Republicans and one Democrat joining them; this follows a similar Senate rejection.[1][2]

signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in prior months but below 2.4% forecasts[1].**

signals.headline: Bank of Korea held policy rate at 2
signals.raw:
Bank of Korea held policy rate at 2.5% for 7th month on Apr 10, 2026, citing oil-driven inflation risks from Middle East conflict[3][1].**  
No newer confirmations or resolutions as of Apr 18, 2026; these updates signal contained pressures amid external shocks, potentially steadying prediction markets on rate cuts[1][2][3].

signals.headline: Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Chatter | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Chatter | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's most active X-related market is "Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by...?", with traders pricing a 97% chance on December 31, reflecting heavy real-time trading volume and sentiment shifts on X as users discuss prolonged timelines amid no recent resolutions[1].

($5M volume), with posts highlighting whale-sized positions on over/under ranges as tweet data updates[4][5].
